query: Tailored business agreements in 90 seconds review

results.title: Trailward: Gamified micro‑lessons that teach any topic in 90 seconds | Product Hunt
results.content:
Tailored plans are a challenge, yes, especially given the multi-month timeframe they can run. But as I wrote in my maker comment, Trailward is primarily about beating procrastination. It helps lower the entry barrier for learning something new, or in the case of tailored plans, it provides the spark to start real transformations. It shows the user what a transformation would really look like and what is needed to master it. It offers structure and makes a complex learning journey more approachable. I think that's really cool.

For committed users, spaced repetition, detailed explanations, practical examples or certificate proposals support the deep dive when needed.

Victor Grdr [...] It began as a system for structured learning plans. However, I found that rigid structures often led to procrastination. That led to the concept of "Bites" - 90-second sessions designed to extract a single, clear insight. The goal isn't to replace deep study, but to make the entry point for curiosity so low that you actually start.

I also integrated an Ikigai discovery tool to help map curiosities to potential career paths, generating tailored learning plans based on the results.

It’s a solo project, built with React Native and FastAPI. Give it a try, it’s designed to be effortless, and I guarantee you’ll walk away knowing something you didn’t before.

I’ll be here all day to answer questions about the product or the technical side of the build.

Kristina Grits
Glam AI

Curious how you're tracking what someone's interested in vs just what they clicked on. YC founder here, researching user context for AI apps.

# Review Reply AI

## Paste a Google review, Get 3 professional replies in seconds

3 followers

## Paste a Google review, Get 3 professional replies in seconds

3 followers

Visit website

Review Reply AI turns one Google review into three ready-to-post reply options for local businesses. Dental clinics, restaurants, salons, hotels, vets — every industry has reviews to answer. Most owners spend 30+ min/week on replies, or don't reply at all. Paste a review, choose industry and tone, get 3 professional replies. No signup for first 5 uses. $19/mo unlimited. Supports 10 industries with multilingual replies.

Reviews [...] Promoted

Hikaru

📌

Hey Product Hunt! 👋 I'm Hikaru, a solo developer in Tokyo. I built Review Reply AI after watching local business owners struggle with Google review responses. The insight was simple: every business owner knows they should reply to reviews, but writing unique, professional responses is tedious. Most end up with "Thank you for your kind words!" on repeat. This tool gives you three distinct options per review — a warm thank-you, a professional response, and an empathetic one. You just pick the best fit and paste it. I'm launching at $19/mo unlimited because I think review management tools are overpriced. The free tier (5/month, no signup) is permanent. Would love your feedback — especially from anyone running a local business! [...] Launch Team
